author: [Client Name]
text: I’ve been working with Purva Sreekant at Setu for my mental health support, and it has been a genuinely impactful experience. Her approach combines practical, evidence-based methods with a strong ability to connect insights to real-life situations, which has helped me identify and work through challenges in a clear and structured way. What stands out is how she adapts her methods based on what is needed in the moment, rather than relying on a fixed approach. She is also flexible with scheduling and makes the process of staying consistent much easier. I would recommend Purva to anyone looking for focused, personalized, and effective mental health support.
